dependency_change_justification: None added. Reranking implemented via existing agents/llm/client.py LLMClient + agents/llm/ollama_client.py OllamaClient (both already shipped, issue #18 subtask 3.4.1). No sentence-transformers/torch/cross-encoder model added -- see architecture-discovery.md section 3.
blast_radius: Isolated additive change. No existing module's behavior changes: vector_rag.py is imported read-only (its public functions/classes), not modified. No other module in the repo imports agents/eval/baselines/, so zero downstream callers are affected.
external_services_touched: local Ollama server (http://localhost:11434), /api/generate endpoint via OllamaClient -- already used by agents/llm/ollama_client.py
local Ollama server, /api/embed endpoint via OllamaEmbeddingClient -- already used by vector_rag.py (5.2.1), reused unmodified
no_paid_api_confirmation: Confirmed: no OpenRouter/Gemini/any paid API client instantiated or imported anywhere in the new module or test file.
